## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Scope

- [ ] Wiki content (`wiki/`)
- [ ] Raw layer (`raw/`)
- [ ] Operator docs (`docs/`)
- [ ] Scripts / tests
- [ ] CI / MkDocs
- [ ] Conventions (`AGENTS.md`, `README.md`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run python scripts/validate_wiki.py --strict`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run mkdocs build --strict` (if docs or nav changed)
- [ ] If wiki pages were added/renamed: `wiki/index.md` updated and `wiki/log.md` appended (if applicable)

## Notes for reviewers

Link related issues or discussions.
